title: RouteSmokeFixture
description: Enumerates every client-side route in apps/web/ and the user-visible strings that MUST appear on first paint. Consumed by the Playwright smoke harness under apps/web/tests/smoke/.

version.description: Schema version; bump only when adding required fields.

capturedOnSha.description: Git commit SHA that the fixture was authored against.

entries.description: One entry per route declared in src/routes.ts.

path.description: Client-side URL path (the part after `#`). Dynamic params written as `:name`. Splat as `*`.

title.description: The <title> element OR the page's visible H1/H2 title.

mustContain.description: User-visible strings that MUST appear in the DOM within 3 seconds of navigation.

viewports.description: Pixel widths at which to run visual-diff captures.

requiresFixture.description: Whether the route needs a mock data seed (e.g., a valid :moduleId).

fixtureSeed.description: Path relative to apps/web/tests/smoke/fixtures/, only meaningful when requiresFixture is true.

reducedMotion.description: When true, the harness forces prefers-reduced-motion:reduce before capture (default).

skipVisualDiff.description: When true, the route runs smoke-only (no baseline PNG). Reserved for routes whose content is highly dynamic (live metrics).
